author: Jdthomas24
description: Monitor device check-in health across Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter, Hub Mesh, LAN, Virtual and Hub Variable — learns each device's normal pattern and alerts you when something goes quiet.
releaseNotes:
v1.5.3 False positive reduction: loosened thresholds (Poor now requires 6× baseline), protocol-aware baseline floors (LAN/Hub Mesh min 8h), pingable devices held at Fair for one scan before reaching Poor, slower baseline learning, state-change verification window extended to full offline threshold.
1.5.4 Bug fix: hub reboot mid-scan no longer leaves isScanning stuck permanently — scan state is now unconditionally reset on initialize.
